race.comment: ALLY (2) improved again beaten a half length over this distance in stronger at the Sunshine Coast. peals and expect the premier hoop to find some cover. Finds the right race and she can go one better. DATA SCRAMBLE (7) was quickly back on track beaten 2 lengths over 1350m at Doomben two weeks ago, jumping a $3.0F. Has an inside draw, some weight relief and the blinkers applied for the first time. A player. MEADOWBROOK (4) resumed at Doomben and couldn't have been more impressive delivering her Maiden. She missed a whisker at Doomben her sole second-up outing and has the winkers on for the first time. Has plenty of scope for improvement and has to be considered. LUMENS LENNY (3) was back to his best placing here first up this grade/trip and forget the one after on the Gold Coast poly where he resented the kickback. He will position forward from the low barrier and will be there when the whips are cracking.
